creator: ultrageranium@bleu255.com
text:
Hello,

I recently updated to 12.1-STABLE (353675) and since then my Thinkpad X1 (Gen 6) cannot wake up from sleep. On opening the lid, screen stays blank/off, sleep LED keeps on blinking as if it was still sleeping and a couple seconds later the machine reboots and I go through a filesystem check.

Before the update, sleep/resume was fine but was exhibiting the issues described here (without noticeable data loss).

For what it's worth, my previous system was somewhere around 351xxx, but before 351914. It's actually this commit that motivated me to update and see if the situation with resume had improved :)

Thanks!
